title: The River of Life by Thomas Campbell
content:
The more we live, more brief appear
Our life's succeeding stages;
A day to childhood seems a year,
And years like passing ages.

The gladsome current

title: The Beech Tree's Petition
content:
O leave this barren spot to me!
    Spare, woodman, spare the beechen tree!
    Though bush or floweret never grow
    My dark unwarming shade

title: The Dirge Of Wallace
content:

    The debt of his nature did pay,

title: The River Of Life
content:
The more we live, more brief appear
    Our life's succeeding stages;
    A day to childhood seems a year,
    And years like passing ages.

title: Freedom And Love
content:
How delicious is the winning
    Of a kiss at love's beginning,
    When two mutual hearts are sighing
    For the knot there's no untying!

title: The Maid's Remonstrance
content:
Never wedding, ever wooing,

    Read you not the wrong you 're doing

content:

title: Lines - Written On Visiting A Scene In Argyleshire
content:
At the silence of twilight's contemplative hour,

title: To The Rainbow
content:

title: Song - Men Of England
content:

title: Benlomond
content:
Hadst thou a genius on thy peak,
    What tales, white-headed Ben,
    Could'st thou of ancient ages speak,
    That mock th' historian's pen!

title: Maternal Hope
content:

title: Hohenlinden
content:
On Linden, when the sun was low,
    All bloodless lay the untrodden snow,
    And dark as winter was the flow
    Of Iser, rolling rapidly.

title: The Soldier's Dream
Love And Madness
content:

content:

title: Adelgitha

title: Ode To The Memory Of Burns
content:
Soul of the Poet! wheresoe'er,
    Reclaimed from earth, thy genius plume
    Her wings of immortality;
    Suspend thy harp in happier sphere,

title: The Last Man
content:
All worldly shapes shall melt in gloom,
    The Sun himself must die,
    Before this mortal shall assume
    Its Immortality!

title: The Child And The Hind
content:
Come, maids and matrons, to caress
    Wiesbaden's gentle hind;
    And, smiling, deck its glossy neck
    With forest flowers entwined.

title: Gertrude Of Wyoming
content:
PART I

    On Susquehanna's side, fair Wyoming!
    Although the wild-flower on thy ruin'd wall,

title: Lines - On The Camp Hill, Near Hastings
content:
In the deep blue of eve,
    Ere the twinkling of stars had begun,
    Or the lark took his leave
    Of the skies and the sweet setting sun,

title: Hope Triumphant In Death
content:
Unfading Hope! when life's last embers burn
    When soul to soul, and dust to dust return,
    Heaven to thy charge resigns the awful hour!

title: Absence
content:
'Tis not the loss of love's assurance,
    It is not doubting what thou art,
    But 'tis the too, too long endurance
    Of absence, that affl

title: Lord Ullin's Daughter
content:
A chieftain, to the Highlands bound,
    Cries, "Boatman, do not tarry!
    And I'll give thee a silver pound,
    To row us o'er the ferry."
